query:
ALTER TABLE teacher_votes 
ADD COLUMN teacherNameId INT NOT NULL AFTER id,
ADD CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_votes_teacher_name 
FOREIGN KEY (teacherNameId) REFERENCES teacher_names(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;
